reason: Checklist context for reviewing TUI-facing behavior changes.
Review unknown-model error behavior against model identity/reasoning contracts and TUI test requirements.
Review cross-layer state consistency and reuse decisions.
Verify implementation stays grounded in confirmed /model and tui-check root causes.
Review merged scope decisions, conflict resolutions, and out-of-scope boundaries.
Review TDD task breakdown, verification commands, and manual QA coverage.
